title: non-root: Error: error creating tmpdir: mkdir /run/libpod: permission denied
body:
podman version 3.3.1
ubuntu 20.04.3
kernel 5.4.0

I can't even run "podman info" without getting the error.
```Error: error creating tmpdir: mkdir /run/libpod: permission denied```

```
$ podman --log-level=debug info

INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug
DEBU[0000] Called info.PersistentPreRunE(podman --log-level=debug info)
DEBU[0000] overlay storage already configured with a mount-program
DEBU[0000] Merged system config "/etc/containers/containers.conf"
DEBU[0000] overlay storage already configured with a mount-program
DEBU[0000] Using conmon: "/opt/podman/bin/conmon"
DEBU[0000] Initializing boltdb state at /usr/local/registrator/.local/share/containers/storage/libpod/bolt_state.db
DEBU[0000] Using graph driver overlay
DEBU[0000] Using graph root /usr/local/registrator/.local/share/containers/storage
DEBU[0000] Using run root /run/user/500/containers
DEBU[0000] Using static dir /usr/local/registrator/.local/share/containers/storage/libpod
DEBU[0000] Using tmp dir /run/libpod
DEBU[0000] Using volume path /usr/local/registrator/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes
DEBU[0000] overlay storage already configured with a mount-program
DEBU[0000] Set libpod namespace to ""
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay"
DEBU[0000] overlay: mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs
DEBU[0000] backingFs=xfs, projectQuotaSupported=false, useNativeDiff=false, usingMetacopy=false
DEBU[0000] Initializing event backend file
Error: error creating tmpdir: mkdir /run/libpod: permission denied
```

```
$ env|grep XDG

XDG_SESSION_TYPE=tty
XDG_SESSION_CLASS=user
XDG_SESSION_ID=3803
XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/500
```

comments.body: @daledude Is `tmp_dir` set in `/etc/containers/containers.conf`? ` /run/libpod` is used when podman is run as root, when rootless it should be using a path under `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR` unless overwritten.
Concur that this seems to have been hardcoded somewhere - c/storage picked up the correct directory.

```tmp_dir = "/run/libpod"``` is only set in **containers.conf** under ```[engine]```. Removing doesn't have an effect. Each time I try to run ```podman info``` I first ```rm -rf ~/.local/share/containers /run/user/500/{containers,libpod}```

Dunno how useful this is but below is a filtered strace:
```
$ strace -f podman info 2>&1 | fgrep /run/
openat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/libpod/tmp/pause.pid", O_RDONLY) = -1 ENOENT (No such file or directory)
[pid 877074] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500", {st_mode=S_IFDIR|0700, st_size=160, ...}, 0) = 0
[pid 877074] mkdirat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/libpod", 01700) = -1 EEXIST (File exists)
[pid 877074] fchmodat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/libpod", 01700) = 0
[pid 877074] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/containers", {st_mode=S_IFDIR|0700, st_size=40, ...}, 0) = 0
[pid 877074] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/current-system/sw/bin/crun", 0xc0000d82a8, 0) = -1 ENOENT (No such file or directory)
[pid 877074] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/current-system/sw/bin/runc", 0xc0000d9218, 0) = -1 ENOENT (No such file or directory)
[pid 877074] mkdirat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/libpod", 01700) = -1 EEXIST (File exists)
[pid 877074] fchmodat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/libpod", 01700 <unfinished ...>
[pid 877074] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/containers", {st_mode=S_IFDIR|0700, st_size=40, ...}, 0) = 0
[pid 877074] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/current-system/sw/bin/crun", 0xc0006332e8, 0) = -1 ENOENT (No such file or directory)
[pid 877074] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/current-system/sw/bin/runc", 0xc00011cc68, 0) = -1 ENOENT (No such file or directory)
[pid 877082] mkdirat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/libpod", 01700) = -1 EEXIST (File exists)
[pid 877082] fchmodat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/libpod", 01700) = 0
[pid 877082] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/containers", {st_mode=S_IFDIR|0700, st_size=40, ...}, 0) = 0
[pid 877082] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/current-system/sw/bin/crun", 0xc00054f148, 0) = -1 ENOENT (No such file or directory)
[pid 877082] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/current-system/sw/bin/runc", 0xc0007b32e8, 0) = -1 ENOENT (No such file or directory)
[pid 877082] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/containers", {st_mode=S_IFDIR|0700, st_size=40, ...}, 0) = 0
[pid 877079] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/user/500/containers", {st_mode=S_IFDIR|0700, st_size=40, ...}, 0) = 0
[pid 877079] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/libpod", 0xc00011df18, 0) = -1 ENOENT (No such file or directory)
[pid 877079] mkdirat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/libpod", 0751) = -1 EACCES (Permission denied)
[pid 877079] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/run/libpod", 0xc0001de9f8, AT_SYMLINK_NOFOLLOW) = -1 ENOENT (No such file or directory)
```

I installed all these versions and it seems the "issue" started at 3.2.2. In all cases I had ```tmp_dir`` not configured in **container.conf**.
```
3.1.2 = worked
3.2.0 = worked
3.2.1 = worked
```
```
3.2.2 = failed
3.2.3 = failed
3.3.1 = failed
```
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@daledude are you still seeing this issue?

since there was no feedback, I am closing the issue.

Please reopen if you still have the problem
